div1.entryFree:
Traffic, vb. 1) to practise commerce: despair to gain doth t. oft for gaining, Lucr. 131.
2) to have business, to deal, to have to do: since dishonour --s with man's nature, he is but outside, Tim. I, 1, 158. to trade and t. with Macbeth in riddles and affairs of death, Mcb. III, 5, 4.
